# usageregistry_consumer_types Data Source

Lists registered consumer types from the DynamoDB-backed usage registry.

This data source queries `pk = "registry#consumer_type"`. It does not scan the table.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "usageregistry_consumer_types" "all" {}

output "consumer_type_names" {
  value = data.usageregistry_consumer_types.all.names
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `consumer_types` (List of Object) Registered consumer types.
- `names` (List of String) Registered consumer type names.

### Nested Schema for `consumer_types`

Read-Only:

- `annotations` (Map of String) Additional string annotations stored with the consumer type.
- `created_at` (String) RFC3339 timestamp when the consumer type was created.
- `name` (String) Consumer type name.
- `updated_at` (String) RFC3339 timestamp when the consumer type was last updated.
- `version` (Number) DynamoDB-backed consumer type version.
